title: Cnv_Accel Function
parameters: conveyorNumber	Integer expression representing the conveyor number (1 ~ 16).
description:
Cnv_Accel Function

Cnv_Accel Function

See_Also Example

Returns acceleration and deceleration of tracking motion in Conveyor Tracking.

Cnv_Accel Statement

Cnv_Accel Function Example

Print Cnv_Accel(1)
